name: Tewa (USA)

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Rio Grande Tewa (tewa1260).

notes: Skeleton. Kiowa-Tanoan (Tewa) language of the Rio Grande pueblos of New Mexico in a practical Roman orthography. Aspirated stops (ph th kh), ejectives with a following apostrophe, labialized kw/gw, v=[β] and the affricates ts/ch are mapped. Tewa is tonal with contrastive vowel nasalization; tone and nasalization are not reliably recovered from this spelling and are left unencoded, raising the PER floor.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Rio Grande Tewa (tewa1260)
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
